summary.whatPartnersShouldNotice: The document highlights practitioner credibility, service clarity and enquiry pathways, rather than visual redesign for its own sake.

readinessStrip: UK, US and Ireland experiences aligned
Strategic crawl handling and sitemap generation verified
Hreflang implementation verified across key route families
Metadata governance retained by page intent
Noindex protections and schema continuity preserved

deliberateDecisions: Substantive publishing remains human-written and human-reviewed.
Directory validation is integrated where independently verifiable.
International routing is explicit and non-simulated.
partnerNarrative.internationalSummary: The international model uses UK as default with US and Ireland as alternates, applying disciplined hreflang alignment without artificial geo-targeting.
partnerNarrative.operationalMaturityParagraph: Operational controls were retained to keep publishing selective, evidence-led and reputation-safe across all principal route families.
partnerNarrative.closingStrip: The platform was structured to support authority, clarity and discretion rather than scaled content production.

annotations.text: Independent recognition and professional context are easier to validate.
